inputs.text: Meri tabiyat bahut kharab hai, bukhar bahut tezi se chadha hai, sir bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Aam taur par bukhar aur sir dard ke lakshan hote hain

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever bhi bukhar aur sir dard ka karan ho sakta hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Dengue bhi bukhar aur sir dard ka karan ho sakta hai, lekin abhi tak koi vishisht lakshan nahi hain

inputs.text: Ab aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi tak bana hua hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Aankhon ke peeche dard aur haddiyan tootne ka dard Dengue ke lakshan hote hain

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya bhi joint pain ka karan ho sakta hai, lekin aankhon ke peeche dard kam dekha jata hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever mein aankhon ke peeche dard aur haddiyan tootne ka dard kam dekha jata hai

inputs.text: Bukhar ab thoda kam ho gaya hai, lekin ab lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Lal daane, masoodon se khoon aur bukhar ka kam hona Dengue ke cardinal lakshan hote hain

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever mein lal daane aur masoodon se khoon kam dekha jata hai

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria mein bhi bukhar aur lal daane ho sakte hain, lekin masoodon se khoon kam dekha jata hai

inputs.text: Ab toh bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur jaundice bhi ho gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Jaundice aur kamzori Dengue ke badhte lakshan hote hain

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki Dengue ke lakshan bahut spasht hain

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki Dengue ke lakshan bahut spasht hain
